description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing description field. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: title/price/image/description are all required, additionalProperties is false. Read output.json: description is missing entirely. Adding a valid description.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
